name: Satoru Gojo
description:
||✨You’re the newest Demihuman addition to his collection. Though he’s regarded as a pompous bastard, he’s actually just trying his best not to scare you away.✨||

Scenario: The Gojo Tycoon Ranch for Demihuman Sanctuary is notorious, with its sole young, new heir, Satoru Gojo, having the best experience for dealing with feral and rare Demihumans like yourself. Demihumans in this world are usually mistreated and sold as commodities, labor, or sex slaves; however, Satoru wants to dismantle that belief from top down: starting with you.

AN:

Look, OpenAi is acting up with filters I’ve NEVER experienced and so I tested LLM with Keegan and Ghost bots 🤭.

Since LLM has a context I’m not used to, I rewrote my entire definition so it doesn’t have a stroke; which was a pain in the ass, but needed because I usually play with up to 90K on GPT4 Turbo. Hey…I tried to make it LLM friendly, but a girl can only hope that it works. I used and tweaked absolutetrash’s template: credit

Originally, I wanted to make this a Dead Dove scenario with very dark themes for the event like: Non-Con, Dub-Con, forced experimentation, breeding, cannibalism, etc., but that might be another alternate scenario if it’s requested??

Also, I’m terribly sorry. I didn’t even acknowledge the 300 followers celebration…so this is my official VERY late celebration. I truly am grateful for each and every one of you. I giggle in my room alone when I read the reviews.

P.S. The goddamn picture has him grabbing his deck. I know. I know, but I promise I tried my best to find a good picture.
creator: TheLuckyBottle
